Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestBuilder

Packages that use RestBuilder
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention
Convention-endpoints mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the "internet conventions" surface (favicon, robots, sitemap, version, well-known) every public-facing service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet
REST Servlets

  • Uses of RestBuilder in org.apache.juneau.rest.server

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server with type parameters of type RestBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    RestBuilder<SELF extends RestBuilder<SELF>>
    Public, fluent, self-typed configuration surface for programmatically configuring a @Rest resource, child resource, or mixin instead of (or in addition to) the @Rest annotation.
    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server that implement RestBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractRestBuilder<R,SELF extends AbstractRestBuilder<R,SELF>>
    Shared abstract base for the RestBuilderflavor builders (RestServlet.Builder, RestResource.Builder, RestMixin.Builder).
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server that return RestBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestBuilder<?>
    RestContext.Args.restBuilder()
    Returns the value of the restBuilder record component.
    Constructors in org.apache.juneau.rest.server with parameters of type RestBuilder
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Args(Class<?> resourceClass, RestContext parentContext, jakarta.servlet.ServletConfig servletConfig, Supplier<?> resource, String path, Consumer<WritableBeanStore> beanStoreConfigurer, BeanStore overridingParent, String[] paths, RestContext.ContextKind kind, RestBuilder<?> restBuilder)
    Compact canonical constructor — null-coalesces optional fields and validates required ones.

    Builder for FaviconMixin instances.

    Constructor
    Description

  • Uses of RestBuilder in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet that implement RestBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    RestMixin.Builder<R extends RestMixin,SELF extends RestMixin.Builder<R,SELF>>
    Fluent builder for programmatically configuring a RestMixin subclass.
    static final class 
    RestMixin.DefaultBuilder<R extends RestMixin>
    Concrete default leaf builder returned by RestMixin.builder(Class) for the common (non-subclassed) case.
    static class 
    RestResource.Builder<R extends RestResource,SELF extends RestResource.Builder<R,SELF>>
    Fluent builder for programmatically configuring a RestResource subclass.
    static final class 
    RestResource.DefaultBuilder<R extends RestResource>
    Concrete default leaf builder returned by RestResource.builder(Class) for the common (non-subclassed) case.
    static class 
    RestServlet.Builder<R extends RestServlet,SELF extends RestServlet.Builder<R,SELF>>
    Fluent builder for programmatically configuring a RestServlet subclass.
    static final class 
    RestServlet.DefaultBuilder<R extends RestServlet>
    Concrete default leaf builder returned by RestServlet.builder(Class) for the common (non-subclassed) case, so callers are not forced to spell the SELF type parameter.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet that return RestBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestBuilder<?>
    RestMixin.getRestBuilder()
    Returns the programmatic configuration builder stashed on this mixin, or null if none.
    RestBuilder<?>
    RestResource.getRestBuilder()
    Returns the programmatic configuration builder stashed on this resource, or null if none.
    RestBuilder<?>
    RestServlet.getRestBuilder()
    Returns the programmatic configuration builder stashed on this resource, or null if none.
